tool.name: Microsoft Agent Framework
tool.description: Microsoft's new multi-language agent framework for building, orchestrating, and deploying agent workflows.
tool.statusNote: Microsoft positions Agent Framework as the migration target for Semantic Kernel and AutoGen users.
tool.logoNotes: Official Microsoft Agent Framework logo asset from the owner-controlled microsoft/agent-framework repo (`python/packages/devui/frontend/public/agentframework.svg`), committed byte-for-byte.
tool.practitionerNote: Worth watching for teams standardising on Microsoft agent patterns, but adoption should still be treated as early and architecture-led.

dataResidency.detail: Self-hosted framework; data residency is operator-determined.

deployment.detail: Library via package manager (Python/NuGet); no managed hosting.

auditLogging.detail: DevUI tracing for local dev; production logging operator-configured.

soc2.detail: Self-hosted library; SOC 2 applies to the operator's infrastructure, not the package.

iso27001.detail: Self-hosted library; ISO 27001 applies to the operator's ISMS, not the package.

iso42001.detail: Self-hosted library; ISO 42001 applies to the deploying organisation.

euAiAct.detail: Developer component, not an AI system placed on the market; obligations rest with the deployer.
